questions.question: Simplify i^7.
questions.explanation: Since i^4 = 1, divide the exponent by 4: 7 = 4(1) + 3. So i^7 = i^3 = i^2 · i = -1 · i = -i.

questions.question: What is (3 + 2i) + (1 - 5i)?
questions.explanation: Add the real parts: 3 + 1 = 4. Add the imaginary parts: 2i - 5i = -3i. Result: 4 - 3i.

questions.question: Multiply: (2 + i)(2 - i). Express your answer as a single number.
questions.explanation: Use the difference of squares formula: (a + b)(a - b) = a² - b². Here, 2² - i² = 4 - (-1) = 4 + 1 = 5.

questions.question: Subtract: (5 - 3i) - (2 + 4i). Express your answer in the form a + bi.
questions.explanation: Distribute the negative sign: (5 - 3i) + (-2 - 4i). Combine real parts: 5 - 2 = 3. Combine imaginary parts: -3i - 4i = -7i.
